# Day 6 – Resume Optimization with Claude

## Objective

Learned how to optimize a resume using AI and improve ATS (Applicant Tracking System) compatibility with Claude.

---

## What I Did

* Read the provided learning resources
* Opened Claude and started a new conversation
* Uploaded my resume
* Used the Resume Optimizer prompt
* Reviewed the ATS analysis generated by Claude
* Improved resume structure and keyword usage
* Generated an optimized one-page resume
* Saved the final optimized version
* Created documentation in GitHub

---

## Key Learnings

* ATS systems scan resumes for keywords and formatting
* Strong action verbs improve resume impact
* Simple and clean formatting performs better in ATS
* AI can quickly identify missing skills and improvements
* Tailoring a resume for specific roles increases chances of selection

---

## Tools Used

* Claude AI
* GitHub
* Resume Optimizer Prompt

---

## Files Included

* Original Resume
* Optimized Resume
* ATS Analysis Screenshots
* Learning Notes

---

## Outcome

Successfully created an ATS-friendly optimized resume using Claude and understood how AI can improve resume quality for job applications.
